active.title: No repeats
active.detail: The planner won't re-ask something you've already covered.

active.title: Grounded questions
active.detail: A new question has to connect to what's actually been said — no generic probing.

active.title: Shallow-answer damping
active.detail: A vague or one-word answer moves the live scores less than a full one.

active.title: Skip shortcut
active.detail: If an answer adds no new signal, the planner skips re-planning and moves straight on.

fired.title: Shallow answer
fired.detail: That answer looked thin, so the scoring was damped for this turn.
